methods.qc: Gold uses silver stations_qc rows with qc_pass=True only
methods.degree_days: tavg=(TMAX+TMIN)/2; heating/cooling degree-days vs base 18 C
methods.extremes: Hot TMAX>=32/35 C; freeze TMIN<=0 C; wet PRCP>=25.4 mm
methods.freeze_season: Freeze TMIN<=0; growing season between last spring and first fall freeze

scope: South Carolina, North Carolina, Georgia long-record USW/USC (50+ year TMAX+TMIN+PRCP) — v1 regional platform
performance_note: UI loads indexes once, then one by_station/{id}.json per station selection
